world.title: Trump unharmed as gunman fires shots toward White House correspondents’ dinner
world.description: President Donald Trump is safe after a shooting disrupted the White House Correspondents’ Dinner. Gunfire erupted outside the ballroom, prompting the evacuation of Trump and top officials. Authorities say a suspect is now in custody, and no serious injuries have been reported.

world.title: Suspected pirates steer cargo vessel toward Somalia, security groups say
world.description: GAROWE, Somalia: Suspected pirates have boarded a St. Kitts and Nevis-flagged general cargo vessel off ​Somalia’s waters and were sailing it toward the Somali coastline, British maritime security groups Vanguard and Ambrey said. ai.title: China blocks Meta Manus deal amid rising scrutiny over AI tech transfers

ai.title: China blocks Meta’s $2 billion acquisition of AI agent startup Manus.
ai.description:
The economic watchdog did not explain its decision to cancel the deal, which Beijing had scrutinized since it was first announced in December. It was largely complete and Manus is already integrated into some of Meta’s tools. 
[Link: China blocks Meta’s $2bn purchase of AI group Manus | https://www.ft.com/content/1e4c269a-5258-406c-a308-e55c3d5d640f?syn-25a6b1a6=1 | FT.com]

ai.title: TCS and Siemens Energy Forge AI-Driven Digital Transformation Partnership
ai.description: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) has formed an agreement with Siemens Energy AG and Siemens Energy India to enhance collaboration in IT services and industrial AI initiatives. This partnership aims to foster AI-led industrial transformation, support TCS’ HyperVault business, and develop resilient digital infrastructure.
